headline: Jim Cramer on Weyerhaeuser: “I’m More Bullish on It Than the Rest of Wall Street”
summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he advised investors to stick with the largest tech companies in the market. When a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer remarked: Okay, here’s the problem: Weyerhaeuser, if rates go up, this stock goes down, and people think rates are going higher. […]
